title: 我每天七点起床。
pinyin: Wǒ měi tiān qī diǎn qǐ chuáng.
titleTranslation_ru: Я встаю в семь каждый день
titleTranslation_en: I Get Up at Seven Every Day
description_uz: «Har kuni soat nechada turasan?» — kundalik tartib haqida ikki kishining suhbati. Bu dialog turish vaqti, ertalabki odatlar, nonushta, ishga borish va uxlash vaqtini so'rashni mashq qiladi. Kundalik hayot uchun eng foydali so'zlar — takrorlab o'rganish uchun ideal.
description_ru: «Во сколько ты встаёшь каждый день?» — разговор двух человек о распорядке дня. Диалог тренирует, как спросить о времени подъёма, утренних привычках, завтраке, дороге на работу и времени сна. Самая полезная лексика для повседневной жизни — идеально для повторения.
description_en: «What time do you get up every day?» — a chat between two people about their daily routine. This dialogue practices asking about wake-up time, morning habits, breakfast, going to work, and bedtime. The most useful everyday-life vocabulary—perfect for repetition.

sentences.pinyin: Nǐ měi tiān jǐ diǎn qǐ chuáng?
sentences.text_translation_ru: Во сколько ты встаёшь каждый день?
sentences.text_translation_en: What time do you get up every day?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.pinyin: Wǒ měi tiān qī diǎn qǐ chuáng.
sentences.text_translation: Men har kuni soat yettida turaman.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Я встаю в семь каждый день.
sentences.text_translation_en: I get up at seven every day.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Qǐ chuáng yǐ hòu zuò shén me?
sentences.text_translation_ru: Что делаешь после того, как встанешь?
sentences.text_translation_en: What do you do after getting up?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 我先刷牙洗脸，然后吃早饭。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ xiān shuā yá xǐ liǎn, rán hòu chī zǎo fàn.
sentences.text_translation: Avval tish yuvib, yuz yuvaman, keyin nonushta qilaman.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Сначала чищу зубы и умываюсь, потом завтракаю.
sentences.text_translation_en: First I brush my teeth and wash my face, then I have breakfast.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Nǐ zǎo fàn chī shén me?
sentences.text_translation_en: What do you eat for breakfast?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.pinyin: Wǒ chī miàn bāo, jī dàn, hē niú nǎi.
sentences.text_translation_en: I eat bread and eggs, and drink milk.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Nǐ jǐ diǎn qù shàng bān?
sentences.text_translation_en: What time do you go to work?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 八点半出门，九点到公司。
sentences.pinyin: Bā diǎn bàn chū mén, jiǔ diǎn dào gōng sī.
sentences.text_translation: Sakkiz yarimda chiqaman, to'qqizda ishga yetib boraman.
sentences.text_translation_ru: В полдевятого выхожу, в девять на работе.
sentences.text_translation_en: I leave at eight thirty and get to the office at nine.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Xià bān yǐ hòu nǐ zuò shén me?
sentences.text_translation_en: What do you do after work?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 我回家做饭，然后看电视。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ huí jiā zuò fàn, rán hòu kàn diàn shì.
sentences.text_translation: Uyga qaytib ovqat pishiraman, keyin televizor ko'raman.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Возвращаюсь домой, готовлю, потом смотрю телевизор.
sentences.text_translation_en: I go home and cook, then watch TV.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_translation_en: What time do you go to sleep?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.pinyin: Wǒ shí yī diǎn shuì jiào.
sentences.text_translation_en: I go to sleep at eleven.
sentences.speaker: B
